title: Citation
description: A single citation in a deliverable's cites[] array. Discriminated union by `kind`. R6 PinpointCite requires per-kind fields; R14 NoLawFirmCitation restricts `kind` to citation_eligible values defined in source-categories.schema.json.

kind.description: R14 enforcement: only citation_eligible kinds permitted. orientation_only kinds belong in deliverable.references[], not here.

doc_id.description: Typed doc_id pointing at the underlying retrieval_log entry. R3 NoMemoryStatutes requires this doc_id to be present in retrieval_log this session.

jurisdiction.description: ISO-3166-2-style. R2 JurisdictionLock requires this to be in TaskSpec.jurisdictions.

url.description: Optional canonical URL of the cited source (e.g., leginfo.legislature.ca.gov page). Renderer uses this for click-through evidence cards.

rendered.description: Pre-formatted display string (e.g., 'Cal. Lab. Code § 2775(b)(1)(A) (2019)'). Renderer fills this from per-kind fields below; Drafter may leave it empty.

relies_on_holding.description: When kind=case_law and this is true, pinpoint_page is required. Set true when the claim's force depends on the case's specific reasoning.

code.description: Bluebook code abbreviation, e.g., 'Lab.' (California Labor Code), 'Bus. & Prof.' (CA Business & Professions Code), 'Gen. Laws ch. 149' (Mass.).

subdivision.description: Optional subdivision letter/number tuple, e.g., '(b)(1)(A)'. Required when the asserted text references a subdivision.

year_enacted.description: Optional year of enactment for the cited version.

title.description: Regulation title number, e.g., '29' (Labor), '26' (Tax), or state CCR title number.

name.description: Full case name, e.g., 'Dynamex Operations W. v. Superior Court'.

pinpoint_page.description: Required when relies_on_holding=true. May be a range.

author.description: Author/institutional author, e.g., 'Restatement (Third) of Employment Law'.

title.description: Treatise title; omit when author IS the title (Restatements).

edition_or_year.description: Edition number or year, e.g., '3d ed. 2024'.
